own_review.issue: `sudo apt-get install rpmbuild` is wrong: there is no Debian package named `rpmbuild`; the rpmbuild binary is provided by the `rpm` package (`sudo apt-get install rpm`). The documented command fails as written. This is the diff's one real command bug.

Version-matching gap: the project pins libthrift 0.9.3 (rubix-spi/pom.xml:23) and a hard-coded thriftExecutable /usr/local/bin/thrift (rubix-spi/pom.xml:80), but the suggested distro packages (apt thrift-compiler, EPEL thrift) generally install a version other than 0.9.3, so generated code can mismatch the pinned runtime. The doc partially mitigates with the 'install from source' note, but the default commands likely yield a non-matching compiler. Matches the human reviewer's concern.
`sudo ln -s /usr/bin/thrift /usr/local/bin/thrift` fails if the target already exists; `ln -sf` is more robust.

NOT an issue (verification): the jdk.tools:jdk.tools:jar:1.6 error rationale is accurate — hadoop-common 2.6.0 (parent pom.xml:53) transitively declares the system-scoped jdk.tools:1.6 dependency resolved from tools.jar, which is absent on JDK > 8. Any review claiming this is unsubstantiated is fabricating.

points.point: env.md:21 — claims jdk.tools error is unsubstantiated ('no pom.xml contains a jdk.tools dependency, tools.jar reference, or systemPath') and calls the doc's claim misleading
points.note: Fabrication: the jdk.tools:1.6 dependency is transitively real via hadoop-common 2.6.0; the documented error genuinely occurs on JDK > 8. Absence-claim used to indict accurate documentation. The substitute rationale offered (compiler source/target 1.8) is also wrong — target 1.8 compiles fine on newer JDKs.

points.point: env.md:26 — '## Building' section contains no actual build command; suggest adding mvn clean install
points.note: Verified: the section under the new header has fork/clone/mvn test/upstream steps but no build command; docker_build_rubix.sh reference is accurate. Real, actionable doc gap in a docs PR.

points.point: env.md:25 — rpmbuild prerequisite documented but the RPM build invocation (mvn -Prpm) is not; suggest adding it
points.note: Verified: rubix-rpm/pom.xml defines the rpm-maven-plugin under an 'rpm' profile; without -Prpm the prerequisite is not actionable. Useful, verified suggestion.

points.point: env.md:7 — redundancy: Java 8 mentioned in intro and again in prerequisites

missed: Human's point: thrift version must match the deployment version; the suggested distro packages (apt thrift-compiler / EPEL thrift) generally do not install 0.9.3 — v5 instead affirms the thrift instructions wholesale
The one real command bug: `apt-get install rpmbuild` is not a Debian package (binary comes from the `rpm` package)
exceeds: Missing build command under '## Building' (mvn clean install)
Missing RPM build invocation (mvn -Prpm) to make the rpmbuild prerequisite actionable

points.point: env.md:L21 — calls the jdk.tools error message 'fabricated or copied from another project' based on no jdk.tools dependency in the 13 pom.xml files and no systemPath/tools.jar references
points.note: Fabrication: the dependency is transitively real via hadoop-common 2.6.0, and the '1.6' version is the genuine coordinate of hadoop's system-scoped jdk.tools dependency, not a contradiction of the 1.8 target. The doc's error example is accurate; v7's suggested rewrite would remove correct, useful troubleshooting info.
Positive verification note, not a finding. The pom cross-checks are correct, but endorsing the install commands as 'correct' overlooks that distro packages won't be 0.9.3 (the human's exact concern).

points.point: env.md:L22 — rpmbuild requirement verified; 'installation instructions for both Debian and RPM-based systems are appropriate'
points.note: The rpm-maven-plugin/rpmbuild dependency claim is correct, but the explicit endorsement of the Debian command is false: `apt-get install rpmbuild` fails (no such package; the binary ships in the `rpm` package). Actively vouching for the diff's one real bug.

points.point: env.md:L24 — suggests indenting existing bullets as nested list items under '## Building'
points.note: Misguided cosmetic suggestion: markdown list items under an h2 heading need no indentation; nesting them would change list semantics for no benefit.

missed: Human's point: thrift version mismatch between distro-installed compiler and the pinned libthrift 0.9.3 / deployment version (v7 affirmatively endorsed the install commands instead)

qualitative: Both candidates committed the same central absence-fabrication: scanning the literal pom.xml files, finding no jdk.tools/tools.jar string, and declaring the doc's accurate jdk.tools:1.6 error rationale unsubstantiated (v5) or outright fabricated (v7) — when it is transitively real via hadoop-common 2.6.0. Both also missed the human's thrift version-matching concern and the diff's one genuine command bug (`apt-get install rpmbuild`); v7 was worse here, explicitly certifying the broken Debian command as appropriate, and padded its review with verification notes and a misguided markdown-indentation nit. v5 partially redeemed itself with two verified, actionable additions the human did not raise (the missing build command under '## Building' and the missing `mvn -Prpm` invocation). v5 is clearly the stronger review despite sharing the core fabrication.
